Registry / Terms / family of gas meters

family of gas meters

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02656 · 1 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
202X2012OIML R137:2012
#02656
3.1.11
group of gas meters of different sizes and/or different flow rates, in which all the meters shall have the following characteristics: the same manufacturer, geometric similarity of the measuring part, the same metering principle, roughly the same ratios Qmax/Qmin and Qmax/Qt, the same accuracy class, the same electronic device (see 0) for each meter size and using the same metrological software routines (if applicable) for those components that are critical to the performance of the meter, a similar standard of design and component assembly, and the same materials for those components that are critical to the performance of the meter.
pending
G 18 — OIML Term-Usage Registry
